hero_subtitle: Empowering citizens with AI-driven transparency. Report issues, track progress, and witness real change in your neighborhood.
features_section_subtitle: Powerful features designed to bridge the gap between citizens and administration.
features_quick_reporting_desc: Report civic issues like potholes, streetlights, or garbage in under 60 seconds with photo evidence.
features_ai_verification_desc: Our AI system automatically verifies reported issues to ensure authenticity and faster processing.
features_tracking_desc: Track the status of your complaint from "Pending" to "Resolved" with instant notifications.
features_resolution_desc: Officers must upload proof of work, ensuring transparency and accountability in every fix.
step_1_desc: Snap a photo of the issue. Our AI automatically detects the category and location.
step_2_desc: CiviSmart AI verifies the report authenticity and alerts the nearest officer.
step_3_desc: Watch the progress in real-time. Get notified with visual proof when it's fixed.
final_cta_subtitle: Join thousands of citizens making their cities better every day.
footer_desc: Next-gen civic engagement platform powered by AI.
footer_copyright: © 2026 CiviSmart. All rights reserved. Made with ❤️ for better cities.
auth_login_subtitle: Login to your secure Gov portal
auth_error_aadhar_length: Aadhar Number must be exactly 12 digits
auth_error_mobile_length: Please enter a valid 10-digit mobile number
auth_error_send_otp_first: Please send and verify OTP first
chatbot_greeting: **Hi!** 👋 I'm **CiviBot**. How can I help you today?
dashboard_upload_desc: Upload a photo of the civic problem. Our AI system will automatically categorize and route your complaint to the correct department based on the image.
dashboard_notification_hint: We'll alert you here when your complaint status changes.
address_search_placeholder: Enter address to search on map...
click_to_select: Click to select or drag and drop a photo
map_try_specific: Try a more specific address or mark it on the map.
no_complaints_yet: You haven't raised any complaints yet.
hero_svg_text: Report civic issues with a photo
